idea-plugin.name: BNEP Cloud Starter
idea-plugin.description:
BNEP Cloud Starter

HTTP API to trigger IDEA Run Configurations. Exposes endpoints on 127.0.0.1:58080:

  • GET /health — health check
  • GET /configs — list all run configurations
  • POST /run — start a configuration in debug mode
  • POST /stop — stop a running configuration
